summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IT Helpdesk Ticket Management System - both backend APIs and frontend UI integration testing successful with excellent results

ui_bugs.issue: Some dropdown selections using [role=option] selectors had timeout issues during automation

passed_tests: Backend: All 20/20 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Authentication: Admin login, user registration, JWT tokens, role-based access
Dashboard: Stats cards, recent tickets, navigation
Ticket Management: Create, view, update, list, filtering, pagination
Comments: Add and view comments successfully
Admin Features: Status changes, ticket assignment, user management
Role-based Access: Users menu hidden from regular users, proper ticket visibility
UI Navigation: All pages accessible, proper routing
Responsive Design: Tablet viewport testing successful
Dark Theme: Properly implemented with priority/status color coding
